artifact: Poopol Wuuj — Principle of the Stories
original: Are wa’ uxe'aal ri ojer tzij.
english: Here begins the old word, where what is hidden and clear is told.
spanish: Aquí empieza la palabra antigua, donde se dice lo claro y lo oculto.
recommendedEditionSource: Albertina Saravia / Juan Rodrigo Guarchaj — Poopol Wuuj, K'ichee'-español
notes: Mode A queue from digitized Popol Wuuj PDF, p. 17. K'ichee' and Spanish witness; English is working rendering.

original: pa kajib' retb'aliil xb'an wi ri raqanib'al xuge ri uwach.
english: The world is measured into four sides, as if by a cord.
spanish: El mundo queda medido en cuatro lados, como si una cuerda lo trazara.
recommendedEditionSource: Albertina Saravia / Juan Rodrigo Guarchaj — Poopol Wuuj, K'ichee'-español
notes: Mode A queue from digitized Popol Wuuj PDF, p. 17. Short working rendering.

artifact: Poopol Wuuj — Mother and Father of Life
english: The Maker and Former is named as mother and father of life.
spanish: El Creador y Formador es nombrado como madre y padre de la vida.
recommendedEditionSource: Albertina Saravia / Juan Rodrigo Guarchaj — Poopol Wuuj, K'ichee'-español
notes: Mode A queue from digitized Popol Wuuj PDF, p. 17. Short working rendering.

original: kya uk'aslemal... ruchuch ugajaaw k'o pa ri ja'.
english: Life is given as breath and movement before any human name appears.
spanish: La vida se entrega como respiración y movimiento antes de que aparezca un nombre humano.
recommendedEditionSource: Albertina Saravia / Juan Rodrigo Guarchaj — Poopol Wuuj, K'ichee'-español
notes: Mode A queue from digitized Popol Wuuj PDF, pp. 17-18. Short working rendering.

original: maj wi winag, chikop, tz'ikin, kar...
english: Before people, animals, birds, fish, trees, stones, caves, and grasses, only the sky rests above.
spanish: Antes de personas, animales, aves, peces, árboles, piedras, cuevas y hierbas, sólo descansa el cielo arriba.
recommendedEditionSource: Albertina Saravia / Juan Rodrigo Guarchaj — Poopol Wuuj, K'ichee'-español
notes: Mode A queue from digitized Popol Wuuj PDF, p. 18. Short working rendering.

original: xaq utukeel remenik, liianik ja’ ub'anom ri palow.
english: The sea lies alone in stillness before the world begins to move.
spanish: El mar yace solo en quietud antes de que el mundo empiece a moverse.
recommendedEditionSource: Albertina Saravia / Juan Rodrigo Guarchaj — Poopol Wuuj, K'ichee'-español
notes: Mode A queue from digitized Popol Wuuj PDF, p. 18. Short working rendering.

original: xaq kchemenik, ktz'ininik chi g'equ'm ub'anoom ri chaq'ab'.
english: Before creation, darkness is not empty; it is a listening silence.
spanish: Antes de la creación, la oscuridad no está vacía; es un silencio que escucha.
recommendedEditionSource: Albertina Saravia / Juan Rodrigo Guarchaj — Poopol Wuuj, K'ichee'-español
notes: Mode A queue from digitized Popol Wuuj PDF, p. 18. Short working rendering.

artifact: Poopol Wuuj — Feathered Serpent in Water
original: Tepeu Q'uuq' Kumatz... k'o pa ri ja'.
english: The Feathered Serpent is present in the waters before the earth rises.
spanish: La Serpiente Emplumada está presente en las aguas antes de que la tierra se levante.
recommendedEditionSource: Albertina Saravia / Juan Rodrigo Guarchaj — Poopol Wuuj, K'ichee'-español
notes: Mode A queue from digitized Popol Wuuj PDF, p. 18. Short working rendering.

english: The origin is told as both manifestation and concealment.
spanish: El origen se cuenta como manifestación y ocultamiento a la vez.
recommendedEditionSource: Albertina Saravia / Juan Rodrigo Guarchaj — Poopol Wuuj, K'ichee'-español
notes: Mode A queue from digitized Popol Wuuj PDF, p. 17. Short working rendering.

english: Creation is not only made; it is cared for as peace.
spanish: La creación no sólo se hace; se cuida como paz.
recommendedEditionSource: Albertina Saravia / Juan Rodrigo Guarchaj — Poopol Wuuj, K'ichee'-español
notes: Mode A queue from digitized Popol Wuuj PDF, p. 17. Short working rendering.
